author: Lucky AI Team
name: lucky-ai
short: AI-powered roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, and hot takes
description: Full-featured Discord AI cog with roasts, TLDR summaries, greentext recaps, chat Q&A, and hot takes. Supports 7 AI providers (NVIDIA, Groq, OpenAI, Moonshot, DeepSeek, Zhipu AI, OpenRouter) with automatic fallback. Interactive settings UI, per-guild configuration, cooldowns, opt-out, and blacklist support.
install_msg: Repository installed. Run `[p]cog install <reponame> lucky_ai`, then `[p]load lucky_ai` and `[p]lsetup` in the server you want to configure. `lsettings` also works immediately as a prefix command.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord message IDs, user IDs, command usage, and message content in a local SQLite database inside Red's cog data directory for AI processing features (roasts, TLDRs, Q&A, hot takes). Message content is only stored from channels explicitly configured by server admins. Users can opt out with `[p]loptout out`, and Red deletion requests are supported.
